title: Nations Odyssey Skill Tree
description: The skill tree from the Nations Odyssey modpack!
body:
The skill tree from Default Skill Trees mod by Pufferfish, but with a little extra! In this derivation of the original skill tree, experience for the Combat category is significantly harder to obtain, and experience in the Mining category is revamped! Not only that, but in the Combat category there are a whopping 8 routes you can take... But be careful! You can only choose one.


This skill tree was taken from the [Nations Odyssey Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nations-odyssey).
